title: Macros
author: SPlatten
body:
Is there any way to execute a macro in a pre-defined workbook ?
I use workbooks to generate reports and have a macro that produces a PDF version of the report by printing to a PDF printer.  Is there anyway to call macros using this add on?

comments.author: guyonroche
comments.body: Macros would be something I could look at adding at some point but not to be able to execute - that's best left for Excel itself.

comments.author: SPlatten
comments.body: Is excel launched in order for the node module to interact with it?  If yes, then executing the macro would take place in the instance of excel, then the results could be accessed.

comments.author: ekochman
comments.body: Any update on being able to support xlsm files? At least being able to open them, modify the worksheets, and then save without losing the macros along the way?

comments.author: SPlatten
comments.body:
I have no idea what this is about and I’m not sure why I received this ?

Kind Regards,



Simon Platten
simonaplatten@gmail.com

comments.author: vanyadymousky
comments.body: @sexualanimal @ekochman Were you be able to find any xlsx/xlsm openxml tool that allows to hold the macro in doc?
